metadata.title: Privacy Policy - Crimson Desert Trainer
metadata.description: Learn how CrimsonDesertTrainer.com collects, uses, and protects your information. Read our full Privacy Policy.

page.title: Privacy Policy
page.description: This Privacy Policy explains how CrimsonDesertTrainer.com collects, uses, and protects your information.

intro.title: Privacy Policy
intro.description: This Privacy Policy explains how CrimsonDesertTrainer.com collects, uses, and protects your information.

information-we-collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
information-we-collect.description: We may collect non-personal information such as browser type, device type, pages visited, and general usage data. We do not collect personally identifiable information unless you contact us directly.

cookies.title: 2. Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve user experience, analyze traffic, and support advertising functionality.

advertising.title: 3. Advertising
advertising.description: We may display ads through third-party advertising networks. These networks may use cookies and similar technologies to show relevant ads based on your browsing activity.

affiliate-links.title: 4. Affiliate Links
affiliate-links.description: Some links on this site may be affiliate links. This means we may earn a commission if you click on a link and take an action, at no additional cost to you.

third-party-links.title: 5. Third-Party Links
third-party-links.description: Our website contains links to external sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those websites.

data-protection.title: 6. Data Protection
data-protection.description: We take reasonable measures to protect your information, but no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.

childrens-information.title: 7. Children's Information
childrens-information.description: This website is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

changes-to-policy.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes-to-policy.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of the site indicates acceptance of any changes.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: touch@crimsondeserttrainer.com
